task_completion.description: The agent places a ruler to measure the Anteroposterior (AP) diameter of the tumor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Axial view (usually Red slice), a ruler is visible spanning the tumor from front to back. The endpoints align with the tumor boundaries.

task_completion.description: The agent places a ruler to measure the Mediolateral (ML) diameter of the tumor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Axial view (usually Red slice), a ruler is visible spanning the tumor from left to right. The endpoints align with the tumor boundaries.

task_completion.description: The agent places a ruler to measure the Superoinferior (SI) diameter of the tumor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sagittal view (usually Yellow slice), a ruler is visible spanning the tumor from top to bottom. The endpoints align with the tumor boundaries.

task_completion.description: The measurement rulers are correctly named in the Markups module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Markups module panel is visible and lists three rulers named exactly 'Tumor_AP_mm', 'Tumor_ML_mm', and 'Tumor_SI_mm'.

task_completion.description: The agent calculates the ellipsoid volume based on the measurements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of calculation is visible (e.g., Python console, system calculator, or a script) or the calculated volume appears in the final report text.

task_completion.description: A JSON report containing the dimensions and volume is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows JSON content with keys: 'AP_diameter_mm', 'ML_diameter_mm', 'SI_diameter_mm', and 'ellipsoid_volume_ml'.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the markups and the report to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' dialog or file explorer is visible showing 'tumor_dimensions.mrk.json' and 'tumor_extent_report.json' in the '~/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Slicer GUI Markups module to place measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Markups module active and the mouse cursor interacting with the slice views to place points.

integrity.description: The agent derived values from the software rather than using external knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not simply type numbers into a file without first placing rulers or performing measurements in the Slicer interface.

integrity.description: The values in the generated report correspond to the visual measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers visible in the JSON report (if shown) are consistent with the length values displayed on the rulers in the Slicer 3D view.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task allows a 10.0 mm tolerance for linear dimension measurements (AP, ML, SI) and a 25.0% tolerance for volume calculations based on clinical inter-observer variability standards. Rulers should be placed on the visible tumor boundaries, but exact pixel-perfect precision is not required.
